data.title: Ronald R. Gendreau appointed Chair of 5Star Life Insurance Company's board of directors, effective January 1, 2026.
data.description: 5Star Life Insurance Company (5Star Life) has appointed Ronald R. Gendreau as Chair of its board of directors, starting January 1, 2026. General Larry O. Spencer, USAF (Ret.), Chairman and President, expressed satisfaction with the decision, citing Gendreau's extensive industry expertise and familiarity with 5Star Life as valuable assets for the company's strategic direction.

data.title: Green Circle Decarbonize Tech Ltd. closed $10M IPO offering 2.5M shares at $4/share for total gross proceeds of $10M.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, Green Circle Decarbonize Technology Limited completed its initial public offering on the NYSE under the symbol GCDT. The offering involved 2,500,000 ordinary shares priced at $4.00 per share, resulting in gross proceeds of about $10,000,000. Underwriters were also given a 45-day option to acquire up to 375,000 more shares at the same price. Green Circle specializes in developing and producing Phase Change Material storage systems utilized in cooling and heating applications, primarily through its Hong Kong subsidiary, Boca International Limited.

data.title: Global quantum computing market expected to grow from $422M to $1.63B by 2030 with a CAGR of 14.5% - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: A recent report on the quantum computing market indicates significant growth potential, with the market expected to reach around USD 1.63 billion by 2030 from the current USD 422 million, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.5% during the forecast period. The report examines the industry trends, global forecasts, and distribution based on the type of drug discovery service offered, therapeutic areas, and key geographical regions. This growth is driven by various factors, pointing towards a promising future for the quantum computing sector.

data.title: GOP pushes bill allowing lawmakers to keep stock; can sell with 7-14 days notice. Dems say it aids insider traders.
data.description: Under the proposed bill, legislators could retain their current stock holdings and make sales after giving a notice period of seven to 14 days. Critics from the Democratic party have labeled this provision as a favor to insider traders.

data.title: CUPE 4900 members reject tentative deal due to financial pressures; planning rally in Newmarket; offer didn't address affordability crisis.
data.description: In Newmarket, Ontario, Paramedics, roads workers, public health workers, and other members of CUPE 4900 are set to hold an information picket and rally outside the upcoming Committee of the Whole meeting. The picket serves as a strong indication of members' mobilization in response to the regional offer, which did not adequately address the significant financial challenges frontline workers are currently facing. Following the rejection of the tentative deal by members, it is evident that it did not effectively tackle the escalating affordability crisis that was highlighted in a recent CUP report.

data.title: Leap software platform showcasing roofing workflows at 2026 IRE in Las Vegas, booth #1745 from Jan 20-22. #innovation
data.description: Leap, a top software platform designed to assist roofers and remodelers in securing and handling more projects, will be showcased at the 2026 International Roofing Expo (IRE) in Las Vegas from January 20 to 22. Those attending the event can visit booth #1745 to witness live demonstrations, interact with the Leap team, and learn about the platform's features.

data.title: Option Care Health sees RS Rating upgrade showing improving technical performance. Will trend continue?
data.description: Option Care Health has seen an improvement in its technical performance as reflected in a recent upgrade in its Relative Strength Rating. The upgrade signifies positive momentum in the stock's performance outlook. The company's stock has shown strong potential for growth, and investors are eyeing its future trajectory with interest. The recent RS Rating upgrade indicates a bullish trend and could potentially attract more investors looking to capitalize on this upward momentum. The stock's performance will be closely monitored to see if it maintains this positive trend in the upcoming trading sessions.

data.title: Lockheed Martin's stock sees RS rating rise, indicating improved technical performance. Will the trend continue?
data.description: Lockheed Martin has recently received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating a positive trend in its technical performance. Investors are eager to know if this momentum will be sustained. The stock has shown a significant increase in its RS Rating, reflecting a potential for further growth. Will Lockheed Martin continue to soar after this recent boost in its rating?

data.title: Arista Networks sees record high stock price, showing renewed strength with upgraded Relative Strength Rating.
data.description: A recent upgrade in Relative Strength Rating indicates improving technical performance for Arista Networks. The stock has hit a record high and is showing renewed strength. Investors are keeping a close watch to see if this positive trend will continue.

data.title: NECC celebrates 50 years with a gala raising $1.5 million for its Annual Fund, highlighting innovation and commitment.
data.description: In Southborough, Massachusetts, the New England Center for Children (NECC) commemorated its 50th anniversary by hosting a record-breaking gala that generated $1.5 million for NECC’s Annual Fund. This event highlighted five decades of groundbreaking contributions, emphasizing innovation, influence, and dedication to enhancing the experiences of children with autism. One Powerful Place, a poignant short film featuring NECC and narrated by comedian Jon, made its debut at the gala, encapsulating the organization's profound impact.

data.title: Hearing Aid Specialist ranked as a top job for 2026 by USNWR, based on findings from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics.
data.description: In Farmington Hills, Michigan, on January 14th, 2026, the International Hearing Society announced that the U.S. News & World Report's January 12 edition has recognized Hearing Aid Specialist as one of the top jobs for 2026. This ranking was determined based on data provided by the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics.

data.title: Proper Company expands in Chicago with Millie on Michigan and The Weyland, plans four more closings in 2026.
data.description: Proper has partnered with CEDARSt to expand its national acquisition platform by acquiring two new properties. In addition, they have a pipeline of four more closings scheduled for 2026. This strategic move demonstrates Proper's commitment to scaling their operations nationally. The announcement was made on January 14, 2026 in Chicago.

data.title: Toxic Waste® Candy marks 25 years, known for intense sourness since 2001 launch. Disrupted industry with bold flavors.
data.description: In Indianapolis on January 14, 2026, Candy Dynamics introduced Toxic Waste® Hazardously Sour Candy® to the market in 2001. Known for its extreme sourness, unique flavor, and innovative packaging, the brand has made a significant impact in the industry. The creators aimed to develop a candy that would challenge children's taste buds.

data.title: New collection in Maine emphasizes reflection with paintings, prose, and poetry, urging readers to appreciate daily life.
data.description: Residents of the MIDCOAST area in Maine are encouraged to take a moment to pause, breathe, and appreciate the power of observation in their day-to-day routines. This message comes as a reminder to allocate time each week for reflection and gratitude, emphasizing the significance of focusing on what is truly important in life. The year is 2026, and it is crucial now more than ever to embrace these mindful practices.
